calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Defaultjudgment
Off Calendar Jul-27-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JAMES LOMAS' Motion To Set Aside Default And Default judgment is denied for failure to provide a proof of service. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
